entry.title: SAP Reserved Characters for Business Place ODN Prefix - India
entry.content:
Hi Experts and Friends,

 

I have a question whether when defining the ODN prefix for the purpose of GST for Business places - India.

The Config in question is : 101319-Assign Number Ranges to Business Places for GST for India.

I have created the Business Places as per the states and wanted to give the prefix for the ODN as per the state codes such as the below;

 

Business Place - RJ (Rajasthan) 

then, it gives me an error as such;

If it was a reserved character, then it shouldn't have let me give it for the business place itself.

 

Is there any workaround or solution for the above do let me know. If we can give any relevant prefix for the ODN as i also tried the numeric state code for Rajasthan(08) and it gave me the same error.

 

 

Thanks,

Bhavesh

entry.title: Re: OUT NOW: SAP Signavio May 2024 release
entry.content:
Hello,

I would like to ask you about TDD licenses of Process Transformation Manager - I don't see it neither in "Manage My Services" as option for purchase nor in partner TDD pricelist - will this be added in the near future? It isn't also available for testing in PDE (Partner Demo Environment). 

It seems like very useful new product in Signavio family but without above mentioned possibilities (DEMO or TDD for performing PoC at our customers) very difficult to sell.

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Digital Skills Initiative Applicant Guide (For self-study candidates)
entry.content:
Hello @David_Chaviano

My name is Eman Kassem from Egypt I'm an ambitious woman working in IT sector having experience of around 6 years as a SAP consultant, I am trying to be professional Consultant that gain experience from work, self study and certificates to grow my career in this direction, I'm very passionate to be well known a professional SAP FICO Consultant in my market place. I'm already learning from SAP Learning Platform. I would like to go deeper in SAP learning with certification preparation.

I'm following under below categories:

- Women
- People looking to switch their careers mid-life

At the end I would like to thank SAP team for this great initiative to contribute in the growth of others.

Regards Eman.

entry.title: Re: Host Alias in SAP Integration Suite Trial
entry.content:
Hi,

Experienced the same issue. This option is not available in the trial version, but it is available in the regular one. You can proceed the course without problems, just ignore it.

entry.title: Re: I can not find /UI5/ABAP_REPOSITORY_SRV in my system.
entry.content: Hello @gregorw sorry I did not understand what do you mean and what should I do exactly?

entry.title: Re: Celebrating the Success of SAP Stammtisch Kolkata August, 2024!
entry.content: Thanks a lot Meghdeep for all your efforts in organizing this event.

entry.title: Re: Error During ChangeSet Offline Call
entry.content:
@bill_froelich 

Update:

after the deactivation of Media property(in SEGW) in the Entity Item I'm able to use CreateEntity action.

Seems like that when an Entity is configured to transfer a Stream you cannot use CreateEntity but you can only use a createMedia.

I do not know if this is a standard OData behavior but it seems to be the case.

entry.title: Quick Start: Build a GenAI Apps on SAP BTP in Minutes with GenAI Starter Kit!
entry.content:
The future of enterprise applications is here, and it’s powered by Generative AI (GenAI). Imagine being able to create sophisticated, AI-driven apps that can generate content, automate processes, and provide intelligent insights—all in just a matter of minutes. This isn’t a distant possibility; it’s a reality you can achieve today with SAP Business Technology Platform (SAP BTP).

 

We’re excited to invite you on September 17, to a dynamic live stream where our experts Rui Nogueira, Vice President - Intelligent Enterprise & BTP Foundation at SAP, Evgenii Skrebtcov, Architect at SAP BTP AI Team, and Peter Conrad, Chief Development Architect at SAP will walk you through exactly how to kickstart your journey in building GenAI-powered apps on SAP BTP. Whether you’re an experienced developer or just getting started with AI, this session is designed to provide you with the tools and knowledge you need to create impactful applications quickly and efficiently.

Why This Live Stream Is a Must-Attend

Generative AI is revolutionizing the way businesses operate, offering new possibilities for innovation and efficiency. However, getting started with AI can often feel overwhelming, especially when it comes to setting up the necessary infrastructure and integrating AI capabilities into your existing workflows. That’s where the SAP BTP GenAI Starter Kit comes in—a powerful, yet user-friendly toolkit that simplifies the entire process, allowing you to focus on what matters most: building and deploying AI-driven applications that deliver real value.

What You’ll Learn

  1. Kickstart Your GenAI Projects: We’ll demonstrate how you can quickly set up and configure all the critical infrastructure components needed to start building GenAI-powered apps on SAP BTP. With the SAP BTP GenAI Starter Kit, you’ll see how easy it is to get up and running, even if you’re new to the platform.
  2. Simplifying SAP AI Core Service and SAP HANA Cloud Setup: Setting up AI infrastructure can be a daunting task, but it doesn’t have to be. We’ll guide you step-by-step through the process of setting up SAP AI Core Service and SAP HANA Cloud, breaking down complex configurations into simple, actionable steps that you can follow along in real time.
  3. Implementing Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) Applications: Learn how to leverage SAP BTP to create Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) applications that enhance your AI capabilities. RAG is a cutting-edge approach that combines retrieval-based methods with generative AI, enabling more accurate and contextually relevant outputs. We’ll show you how to implement this powerful technique, tailored specifically to your use case.
  4. Enhancing AI Results for Your Use Case: Every business is unique, and so are the challenges it faces. We’ll explore techniques to fine-tune and optimize your AI applications to ensure they deliver results that are not only accurate but also highly relevant to your specific needs. From customizing data inputs to refining AI models, you’ll gain insights into making your AI applications truly your own.

Who Should Attend

This live stream is perfect for developers, IT professionals, AI enthusiasts, and business leaders who are eager to explore the potential of Generative AI within their organizations. Whether you’re looking to enhance your current applications or create entirely new AI-driven solutions, this session will equip you with the practical knowledge and tools to succeed.

Why You Shouldn't Miss This Opportunity

AI is transforming industries at an unprecedented pace, and the ability to harness its power can set your business apart from the competition. By joining this live stream, you’ll not only learn how to build GenAI-powered apps quickly and effectively, but you’ll also gain a deeper understanding of SAP BTP’s capabilities as a robust platform for innovation.

Don’t miss this chance to be part of the next wave of AI-driven business transformation. Whether you’re looking to improve customer experiences, streamline operations, or develop new products, this session will provide you with the insights and practical guidance you need to start building the future today.

When

September 17, 2024 at 15:00 CEST

Join the Live Session on YouTube

Add to calendar: https://url.sap/iw7xd1 

Get ready to accelerate your GenAI journey with SAP BTP. Discover the tools, techniques, and strategies that will empower you to create AI-powered apps in just minutes. See you at the live stream! 😊

entry.title: Re: How to update key field in RAP managed scenario?
entry.content:
Hi @Andre_Fischer 

is there a way to update those on create determination in managed scenario?

I have the userid as a key field, but I would like to set it from the backend and not to pass if from the UI.

Regards,

Georgi

entry.title: Re: Group Currency mismatches with local currency
entry.content: did you know the reason behind this issue?

entry.title: Why get_selected_rows of cl_gui_alv_grid isn't working with only one selected record?
entry.content:
Hi, experts.
Why get_selected_rows of cl_gui_alv_grid not working with only one selected record?
Is it should work like that.
ls_layout-sel_mode = 'A'.
And everything is good when it's more than one.

entry.title: Re: How to push down a filter using current date value to ABAP source
entry.content: Hi Matt, if you are still looking for a solution, I found one which i explain in my blog

entry.title: Re: Transfer stock error
entry.content:
Please use Mvt 343 to move from blocked to unrestricted.

Mvt 321 can only be applied when deciding on inspection lot.

Regards.

entry.title: Re: POD flow with movement 631
entry.content:
Hello Barath,

 

Thanks for your reply. Actually we opened an incident to SAP which states that 687+631 is not supported since the POD concept is to confirm the change of property which is not happening in the consignment process.

We'll go with a custom solution similar to yours. How did you set the stock in transit with the custom VLPOD? Where you able to update the document flow on the delivery? It is possible to put the stock in transit directly from MIGO?

Thanks

entry.title: Sales Invoices for Export sales with payment of IGST and without payment of IGST tax
entry.content:
Hi Experts and Friends,

 

Kindly guide wherein the below case for export sale invoices there should be a checkbox or custom field for the application of IGST on the export sale invoice. That checkbox decides whether the IGST will be applied in the invoice or not.

In case of Export Sale Invoices do we have condition or tax code wherein IGST get posted and reversed to a different account simultaneously.

For Example,

With payment of IGST

Export Sale Invoice is $1000 and the IGST is $180,

In this case the total invoice pricing should include the IGST of $180 for which the journal entry will be;

Receivable Foreign              Dr.  $1180

    To Revenue                      Cr.             $1000

    To IGST-Output                Cr.             $180

Then, simultaneously another entry is posted in the background as below;

IGST-Output                           Dr.   $180

   To IGST Receivable             Cr.            $180

The said IGST receivable is then received as form of duty drawback months later when the payment is completed.

 

And the other condition being the exclusion of IGST totally, in which case the entry will be;

Receivable Foreign              Dr.  $1000

    To Revenue                      Cr.             $1000

 

If there is some solution or workaround to the above case any suggestion is greatly helpful.

 

Thanks

Bhavesh

entry.title: Custom Field on GST Statutory reports - India
entry.content:
Hi Experts and Friends,

 

Can anyone guide me if we can add the invoice level custom fields on the GST Statutory Reports - India.

If it possible any configurations or activations are to be done do suggest.

 

Thanks

Bhavesh

entry.title: Re: Report on Content URL in LMS
entry.content: This is brilliant thanks

entry.title: Re: Use pre-defined Baiwang Golden Tax Integration Flows with S/4HANA on Premise (GTI)
entry.content:
Hi,

Have you received any response from SAP on your ticket. I saw a new updated link 

https://api.sap.com/package/SAPDocumentandReportingComplianceElectronicInvoicingforChina/overview

but still not clear how it will work with S/4HANA on prem with Ariba Network 

Regards

Gaurav

entry.title: Re: Transfer stock error
entry.content: No, the movement type is mandatory. A complete list of movement types you can find in SSCUI 103898. There is also a blog in the community in regards to movement types (https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-members/sap-good-movement-types-list-of-sap-movement-types/ba-p/13551698).

entry.title: Re: Use pre-defined Baiwang Golden Tax Integration Flows with S/4HANA on Premise (GTI)
entry.content: Yes, due to my incident the documentation was updated. But as mentioned in the documentation "This solution support both SAP S/4HANA Cloud and SAP S/4HANA On Premise versions.". So what exact integration do you look for Ariba?

entry.title: Re: Tracking Air Scenario in BN4L GTT
entry.content:
Hello,

With GTT yes you can Track and Trace with Air Mode, i.e the Master Airway Bill can be used for track you need check with the 3rd party content provider (coverage vary per visibility provider).
Regards

entry.title: Re: Overall status of sales order (IC -CTAD) showing irre...
entry.content: Sir, We have already assigned x to that perticular reason of rejection. screenshot has been attached for reference (Image 3).

entry.title: Is there a way to update "delivery block" for SO Item before the SO is saved?
entry.content:
Hi there,

We need to implement a block at the item level for a material before saving the Sales Order. Currently, there is no BADI available that allows us to modify the DELIVERY BLOCK field at the item level. Although we have the BADI "SD_SLS_MODIFY_HEAD_BUSINESS," it does not include the DELIVERY BLOCK field in its changing parameters, making it unsuitable for adjusting the delivery status at the item level. Are there any extensibility options available that would allow us to update the DELIVERY BLOCK field? 

Thanks and Regards


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to update "delivery block" for SO Item...
entry.content:
Hello,

(1) Based on the current product:

Currently there is no BAdI that supports automatically assigning a item-level delivery block before the sales order is saved.

Instead of BAdI, as a workaround, would you check if API - Sales Order (A2X) can fulfill your requirement, e.g., assigning a "DeliveryBlockReason" (on header level) when the sales order is created by this API?

See more details from the Help Portal Sales Order Header: DeliveryBlockReason: "Indicates if an entire sales order is blocked for delivery".

(2) Besides, you are also encouraged to submit a feature request through the Customer Influence Portal under the section SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, Sales, e.g., requiring relevant configuration activities which can help you define default delivery block reason when sales order is created, etc.

KBA 2963059 - How to Submit Feature Requests for SAP S/4HANA Cloud Product

Thank you!

entry.title: Security deposit refund process through FICO for fica customers
entry.content:
Hi,

Can anyone please help me on the Security deposit refund process through FICO for fica customers.

I got one requirement that once the security deposit is released in isu fica it needs to go to the fico and the refund will be need to do from the fico through F110.

Is this scenario is possible?

entry.title: Cannot install SAP Host Agent hana installation
entry.content:
Hi,

I am installing HANA 2.00.065 on an HA node but it fails with below message.. 

 

Output line 71: Installing SAP Host Agent version 7.22.57..

Output line 72: Installation failed

Output line 73: error installing

Output line 74: Cannot create Instance

Output line 75: Cannot install SAP Host Agent

Please suggest

entry.title: Can you use custom data to filter in REO SAP DM? Is characteristics sequence only available with vc?
entry.content:
Hi all.
In DMC Dispatching & Monitoring 2.0 we would like to add custom data fields to the list of filters. 

As an example, the Material Drawing number is sent to DM via IDOC (MATMAS03), we then wish to filter on this value within the Operation Worklist section of Dispatching & Monitoring.

 

Any advice appreciated. 

 

Thanks

Mark

entry.title: Re: Security Deposit Interest Calculation For Days
entry.content: Yes I have assigned in the line item level for particular security deposit and in master data also.

entry.title: Duplicate Email address of S-User id Error
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

 

In S-user ID, we are getting the below error of duplicate email ID, but this ID is not used for any other S user.

Please let me know what could be the reason.

 

Regards,

Krishna Varma

entry.title: Re: Is there a way to update "delivery block" for SO Item...
entry.content: Besides the above answer, you can check whether the "Delivery Block" setting in the configuration activity "Configure Sales Document Types (ID: 102495)" can fulfill this requirement.

entry.title: Ariba Network + VIM in China via Baiwang
entry.content:
Hello Gurus, 

I recently saw an update from SAP regarding S/4HANA connection with Fapiao via Baiwang. Has anyone implemented this for China Entity. 

https://api.sap.com/package/SAPDocumentandReportingComplianceElectronicInvoicingforChina/overview

Currently, we have Ariba Network implemented in our company and now with this news, I am looking to implement Ariba Network + VIM in China. 

Regards

Gaurav G.

SAP Ariba Procurement SAP S/4HANA Finance SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition Sourcing and Procurement

entry.title: Re: Workflow Configuration for SAP S/4HANA Sales Price
entry.content:
Hello,

Good information - thank you! Does anybody know if workflows can be configured based on product division for instance? and specifically in case where product division is not part of any key combination?  Alternatively - can workflow be configured per product or product hierarchy? This is to address a business model where different people are responsible for approvals on different product lines but pricing conditions remain common.

entry.title: Re: Multiple Branches or Different Companies In SAP B1
entry.content:
Excellent article and well articulated. 

We came this issue during the Business Blue Print review after deciding multiple legal entities as Branches in a single database. During the review, we found it would not fulfil our demand for all the reasons mentioned in this blog.  Mainly, we need

  • To set different posting periods for each branch.
  • we  have different Tax structure for each branch.
  • Companies have different local and system currencies for each branch.

    We are going to use only the Finance module in SAP B1. The operations are from our own (home grown) software system which is managed in a single database for multiple companies.

    Since in SAP B1, there will be multiple databases for us, is there any challenge to migrate/integrate from a single database (based on company to a specific database in SAP B1).

    Thanks for your support

entry.title: Field cannot be updated (ODBC -1029) when adding Incoming Payment against Service Invoice
entry.content:
Hi all,

I'm using SAP B1 10.0 FP 2111.

I have a problem in adding the incoming payments based on a service invoice. The payment means selected is Bank Transfer. Please note that there is Export Customer & payment is in Foreign Currency. This happens not only while taking Payment entry based in Service Invoice but also when doing Manual Reconciliation of Service Invoice & On Account Incoming Payment. All details has been added properly, but the system show the error message while adding Incoming Payment as below: 'Field cannot be updated (ODBC-1029)' <<Message 131-183>>

Please recommend a solution and also suggest reasons for occuring such query again & again for Service AR Invoice.

Thanks in advance!!!
.

entry.title: Re: SAP MDG: HANA Search making default for both Customer...
entry.content:
Hi

This communicator controls the search UIBBs and we can change the order or remove in Customizing as per requirement.

Hint : Navigate from SE80 if there are challenges opening it from UI Configuration page.

entry.title: Re: Need to know the default host creation.
entry.content:
For a deployed api proxy, it shows you the url in the header.

For an iflow, you need to look in Manage Integration Content, for Endpoints. You can locate the tile in Monitor/Integrations and APIs. You navigate here from the iflow designer after deployment from the Deployment Status Properties tab of the iflow.

entry.title: Re: Use pre-defined Baiwang Golden Tax Integration Flows...
entry.content: We have implemented the SAP Business Network in our company and are now expanding/transforming the scope towards the China entity. So basically, I am looking at how S/4HANA + BN + VIM via Baiwang handle China's e-invoice (Fapiao).

entry.title: Announcing SAP Inside Track Bengaluru 5th October 2024
entry.content:
We are excited to invite you to SAP Inside Track (SIT) Bengaluru on October 5th, 2024! This year, we are offering an exclusive opportunity to explore the future of SAP Business AI—the forefront of innovation.

Join us as we delve into the world of Business AI: learn how to build AI solutions on SAP BTP, discover how partners and customers are leveraging SAP Business AI, and explore various SAP solutions with embedded AI through hands-on, insightful sessions and demos.

Event Overview

SAP Inside Track 2024 – Business AI Edition aims to provide CXOs, Leaders, Developers, Consultants, Architects, and IT Managers with a deep understanding of how to effectively integrate Business AI with SAP products.

This free event is your gateway to unlocking the full potential of SAP and AI within your organization.

What is SAP Inside Track?

SAP Inside Track is a community-driven event where SAP professionals, developers, consultants, and leaders gather to share knowledge and insights on SAP-related topics. Organized by members of the SAP Community, it provides a platform for fostering connections, staying updated on SAP technologies, and gaining recognition for your technical expertise.
Know more about SAP Inside Track Here!

Event Details:  

Date: October 5th, 2024 
Time: 8 AM - 5 PM IST 
Venue: SAP Labs India, 138, SAP Labs Rd, EPIP Zone, Whitefield, Bengaluru, Karnataka 560066 

Registration:  

Don't miss out on this incredible opportunity to be part of Bengaluru's largest SAP community event!

Register Now!
Note: This is an in-person event only.

Agenda:  

This SAP Inside Track will be a full-day exploration of SAP Business AI. You will:

  • Learn to build AI-powered applications on SAP Business Technology Platform.
  • Discover innovative Business AI solutions from leading partners.
  • Witness the transformative power of Embedded AI through live demos across SAP solutions.

Our event features expert-led sessions by SAP, partners, and customers. Plus, a dedicated hands-on workshop zone and demo booths showcasing AI use cases.

Stay tuned for the full agenda, which will be posted soon! Join the SAP Community Bengaluru group to stay updated!

Speaker Registration:

Speaker registrations are now open! If you're an expert in building AI applications on SAP BTP, developing innovative Business AI solutions, or working with embedded AI in SAP solutions like SAP S/4HANA or SuccessFactors, we welcome your contribution. We also invite partners and customers to showcase their work.
Register as a speaker here!

Exclusive Sponsorship Opportunities:

With over 4,000 community members across locations in the past 12 months, we’re eager to continue growing. If you're interested in sponsoring the event, please comment below, and we’ll reach out to you. This year, we have exclusive sponsor bundles that offer opportunities to showcase your content and expertise across multiple locations, including Bangalore, Gurgaon, Hyderabad, and Pune.

Join the Bengaluru SAP Community Group:

If you're in Bengaluru or Karnataka, join the Bengaluru SAP Community Group to engage in discussions, share ideas, and collaborate with fellow SAP enthusiasts.
Stay connected with us on Twitter and LinkedIn for updates on this and future community events.

Best Regards,
Ranjeet

entry.title: Can not use replication flows to replicate CDS Views from S4HANA OP to Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi all,
I want to replicate CDS Views from S/4HANA On Premise to Datapshere using Replication Flows but I get this error while trying to import the CDS Views "Getting dataset definition failed for <the path to cds view>"

I have checked the relevant SAP Notes but could not figure out what the problem is.
In the CDS Views, there is also these annotations specified

@Analytics:{

dataCategory: #DIMENSION,

dataExtraction: {

enabled: true,

delta.changeDataCapture: {

automatic : true

}}}

Appreciate help from everyone in the community. Thank you!

@tobias_koebler @DanielKraemer @VinayBhatt 
I have seen the articles from you guys, maybe you can help here...? Many thanks!

entry.title: Re: Highlighting New Content in the Trainer's Tree Structure
entry.content: I suspected that already, and it would have been great to have a built-in option. A 'What's New' panel on the Description or Autostart page would be a helpful addition. Thank you for your suggestion!

entry.title: Recursive Bom Periodic Unit Price
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

We are trying to analyze Periodic Unit Price for production material. For one line we are not able to figure out from where this value is coming from. We noticed that for production of material  A is consumed the same material A. Could you please explain how periodic unit price is calculated in that case? what is the formula behind it in SAP?

entry.title: Re: Crystal Reports 2020 Ole Object retain design size an...
entry.content:
You can do this using a UFL (User Function Library). You can create your own or use an existing one.

Ken Hamady maintains a list of 3rd-party UFLs here.  
At least one of these UFLs provide functions for resizing & cropping images on-the-fly.

entry.title: Re: How To Do DTO in BW/4HANA Step by step
entry.content: Do you know where this option is coming? Is this a manual selection or automatically the connection name will be changed after importing the ADSO to the different environment?

entry.title: Re: How to Automate "Set Ready for Shipping" status for O...
entry.content:
Hi @Prashanth2_D ,

in S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, there is no app or configuration available in standard to set the status automatically. But you can build a custom report as side-by-side extension and use this API to set the status.

Best regards,
Christian

entry.title: Re: Cross-company stock transfer: Condition P101 in billi...
entry.content:
Hi and thanks,

 

the billing document was created using VF01, no BAPIs involved.

The Details for the first row: P101            207         Condition has been found (without condition record)

For the second row: P101            216         Condition value has been taken from preceding document

 

Thanks again
Jens

entry.title: Re: Midpoint Scheduling in SAP Digital Manufacturing Resource Orchestration
entry.content: Thanks for the nice words, @RajeshMohan ! 🙂 PP/DS can be master and operations can be automatically dispatched in REO as a slave with minor config. Br, Manoel

entry.title: Re: Notification trigger from SAP Build Process Automation to SAP Build work zone advanced
entry.content: I'm looking for the exact same thing. How in general can I trigger notifications for Workzone from Build Process Automation?

entry.title: Re: Not able to log in to manager via SSO
entry.content: Any chance local firewall/IP allowances have changed with network restriction? Patch updates of maybe a local network assumption for AVD (Virtual desktop) implementation from a landing page? We received similar for our internal customers attempting to access via AVD with no legacy whitelisting taken into acct for external/cloud sites, due to the assumption that our dashboard view on our intranet indicated an app was homegrown/local and was not.

entry.title: SAP Build Apps BTP Destination Not Working When Deployed - Works in Preview
entry.content:
I have created the destination shown below, then connected it to Build Apps via Universal REST API integration. 

It works well when I click on test, or in the preview. 

However, when I deploy it and open it, the destination returns 500 without any explanations. 

Has anyone come across a similar issue?

entry.title: is there any possibility to add the more than one partner in syndicated facility in sap trm
entry.content: in TM_60 sowing only one partner can any one help me out this

entry.title: Re: Side-by-side POD Plugins using Layout Containers within SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content: Hello @PiotrSzy , I honestly never tried that. Have you tried? Br, Manoel

entry.title: Re: cl_attachment_service_api usage in S/4HANA Cloud Publ...
entry.content:
Hi @dblackwood 

 

Is there a reason why you need to use cl_attachment_service_api  instead of the API API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV ?

 

For API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV  there is documentation and samples available 

https://api.sap.com/api/API_CV_ATTACHMENT_SRV/overview

 

I checked and for cl_attachment_service_api and i could find no sample code available

 

Best Regards

Enda

entry.title: Re: What is the load method for Business Partner-Customer with Credit Management in S4HANA
entry.content: Did you get the steps

entry.title: Re: [SAP BYD - HELP] CSRF token validation failed
entry.content:
Hi I have a similar issue. We are getting a 404 with this error message:

The server has not found any resource matching the Data Services Request URI.

We are doing a POST request to an odata service (khemployeetime) SubmitToApproval action. An other request to the same service is working, but this not.

submittoapproval is working in Postman when getting the token in Postman by executing the GET of khemployeetime.

I tried your solution but there are multiple issues:

first I do not get the token when executing in ABSL code. When I try this in Postman it works fine to get the token.

When I hard code the token in ABSL that I got from Postman I get the error 404 with the error message.

 

Do you have any clue?

 

I think it has nothing todo with authorization more then getting the request available in ABSL.

 

Is there somewhere something different when requesting an action?

entry.title: Re: Integrating SAP S/4HANA Data into SAP HANA Cloud Using SAP Datasphere
entry.content:
Hi,

I was not able to find the enablement "data-analytics-service-orcarel-osb". Are you sure the booster is working?

Regards,
Michael

entry.title: Re: Handling of Blank iFrame in SAP Build Process Automation(SBPA)
entry.content:
Great explanation @AjithkumarShanmugasundaram!

Is there a way to extract the current contents from contentDocument.documentElement.innerText after reading from screen and store it in a variable? For e.g. getting the value "USA only jobs (job country field=USA). This is a view only field for all other countries." from below rich text editor and store in a variable that can be access later.

entry.title: Re: Configuration Transport Center: New way to view, download and transport configurations on your S
entry.content:
Hello @hariprasadgud ,

We are currently exploring the Configuration Transport Center and are generally very pleased with its capabilities 😀.

To use CTC in our configuration change process, we are trying to figure out the best way to incorporate CTC.
We know that CTC is not covering 100% of the features, but what would you advise? In the end state, should we still be able to manually change in production or should that ideally only be done in a development environment? Maybe 1 or 2 Super Admins with edit access? What is SAP's best practice, process wise?

Looking forward to your reply!
Roos🌹

entry.title: SAP PHR program not sending to all email addresses in Variant
entry.content:
I have a program in PHR - HR ERP Prod System.

The program allows for multiple email addresses to be maintained in the variant.  However, when the program is executed (both foreground and background) the email is only sent to the top of stack email address.  

Is there program logic that needs to be maintained to allow for the email to go to all recipients?

entry.title: Re: Task 1 - Create CDS View Entity ( August Developer Challenge )
entry.content:
Challenge complete.
Class DefinationData PreviewTable creationData View Entity-1Data View Entity-2

entry.title: Re: Handling SFCs with Lot Size > 1 in SAP Digital Manufacturing
entry.content:
Hello @lokesh_magham ,

As far as I know, this is currently not possible. See: https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-digital-manufacturing/integration-guide/mapping-material?q=lot%20size

Note

The lot size isn't downloaded from the integrated SAP ERP or SAP S/4HANA system. By default, it's set to -1.000 in SAP Digital Manufacturing for execution. If a serial number profile is present, the lot size is set to 1.

Br,Manoel

entry.title: Re: BTP CF APPROUTER AuthType None Problems
entry.content: Hi @gregorw do you know the mentioned solution? "We are currently working on a different solution to fulfil this requirement."

entry.title: Maintaining User Status for Inquiry from Workflow
entry.content:
Hello, 

I want to create a workflow in GUI (tcode: swdd) in order to assign a user status (status profile) to a document type when some specific actions happen in the system. The goal is to have the document blocked from modification and when a user accepts or declines the document a new user status to be assigned to it so the document can be modified again. 
I want this action to happen for Inquiries (BUS2030). 
About Sales Order (BUS2032) there is the method SET_STATUS (.setUserStatus) in order to maintain a user status. But this method doesn't exist for business object inquiry BUS2030.
Is there any SAP Standard solution to it? Or should I approach the problem differently?
In case there is the need for a custom object that will involve this SET_STATUS method how can I approach the problem and use this method. Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Duplicate Email address of S-User id Error
entry.content:
Hi Krish_SAP 

We suggest to create incident using component SBO-CRO-SMP to investigate issue further by us.

Thank You.

Kind Regards
Nidhi

entry.title: Re: Parallel Processing with SUBMIT program
entry.content:
Hi Sandra,

                Thanks for your response. I want to split the data into packets based on the number of records. Not everytime do we have huge records, there can be fewer records as well. How can i determine how many packets we can split them into?

Also inorder to improve the performance of a program which does a SUBMIT to a standard program, what is best approach. will above approach where we split into sizeable packets and execute them as parallel jobs help? Are there any better options? Business is suggesting parallel processing with dialog process instead of background process , is it possible in this case?

entry.title: Unable to download the data in excel in Recipe in PLM
entry.content:
Hi, 

Have an issue while extracting the Cost data in the recipe calculation in PLM. When recipe cost is exported to excel, it opens in XML format rather than excel in webdynpro frontend appln.

Path: PLM->Recipe Development-> Recipe-> Recipe Calculations-> Costs

But for other tabs in recipe calculations like Composition, Nutrients, Allergens, etc.. the data gets exported to excel with no issue. Issue is only with Costs tab.

Please find the attachment:

Could someone help me out.

Regards,

Aishwarya B

entry.title: Close another abap program, in manner similiart to LEAVE PROGRAM
entry.content:
Hello,

I was curious if it was possible to have another program in abap act as a service/listener and close other abap programs in a manner similiar to LEAVE PROGRAM, that is to say it returns the user to the place which they called the program, or the program returns to that point.

entry.title: Re: SAP B1 Web Client Not Accessing On Mobile Browser
entry.content:
Hi  FarazMaqsud

As of 10.0 FP 2208, the internal and external addresses for the System Landscape Directory are unified. If you intend to update the SLD address, you just need to change it from the Security tab. In addition, you can also edit the address of the authentication address. Note If you upgrade SAP Business One from a lower version to 10.0 FP 2208, you must reconfigure the SLD and authentication server address on the Security tab. If you have configured a nginx reverse proxy, you need to download the updated nginx file which contains the authentication server.

Log in to the SLD control center. On the Security tab, in the SAP Business One Authentication Service area, choose Edit. In the Update Address window, update the address and port number for the authentication server or SLD. Note Make sure that you define a correct address for the SLD and authentication server. The whole SAP Business One landscape does not work if the address is incorrect. Make sure that the address is accessible to both internal and external networks. You can add a record in the DNS to make the address is accessible for the internal networks. After updating the address of the authentication service, restart all component services and log in to the SLD control center again with the new network address.

Please check SAP Note 3228614 - Changes to Internal and External Network Settings

And SAP Business One Administrator's Guide

7.1.6 Mapping External Addresses to Internal Addresses

7.4 Enabling External Access to SAP Business One Services

Kind Regards
Nidhi Singh
SAP Business One Support

Please help.

My SAP S/4 version is: 1909

entry.content:
While executing the FM FAGL_GET_GL_DOCUMENT, I am getting the below dump.

I have analyzed and found that The error is coming from below class CL_ABAP_CORRESPONDING-> EXECUTE. Inside this I do not find any executable statement here to debug this.

How to debug and find the root cause of the variable which is giving overflow error.

 

 

According to me , It is coming from the below variable MSL

Could you please check it.

entry.title: Re: Data Migration object in S/4 HANA Cloud-Supplier extended
entry.content: Hi, we will remove the "SAP Community" tag as it is not relevant to the posted topic.

entry.title: Re: Is it Possible to Deserialize this JSON from API in ABAP
entry.content:
You are correct, when I remove the commas after the '4' rows, Notepad++ generates a Schema.  This was just from me "cleaning up" the JSON data, not how the API is returning the data.  But I'm not sure how to turn that schema into an ABAP structure for /ui2/cl_json to deserialize into.  Here is the schema that is generated by Notepad++:

{
"$schema": "https://json-schema.org/draft/2020-12/schema",
"properties": {
        "outputs": {
                "type": "object"
        },
        "tables": {
              "items": {
                    "properties": {
                          "columns": {
                                "items": {
                                      "type": "string"
                                },
                                "type": "array"
                          },
                          "rowLimitExceeded": {
                                "type": "boolean"
                          },
                          "rows": {
                                "items": {
                                      "items": {
                                            "type": "string"
                                      },
                                      "type": "array"
                                },
                                "type": "array"
                          }
                    },
                    "required": [
                          "columns",
                          "rowLimitExceeded",
                          "rows"
                    ],
                    "type": "object"
              },
              "type": "array"
        },
        "transactionNo": {
              "type": "string"
        }
},
"required": [
        "outputs",
        "tables",
        "transactionNo"
],
"type": "object"
}

Any idea on how to generate or match an ABAP deep structure to this schema?

entry.title: Re: Error when trying to create a scheduled publication in SAC
entry.content: On trying to find the cause of the issue, it is not permissions related, data load also had to be ruled out as the error comes even when run from small volume of data; even checked the connection configuration and did not find anything wrong. please suggest.

entry.title: CAP Handler for all entities at once
entry.content:
Hi All!

I'm doing an Experiment for an 'audit log table' for CAP. My objective is log all create/update/delete transactions, something like this:

this.before(['CREATE', 'UPDATE', 'DELETE'], 'Users', async (req) => {
const { ID, firstName, lastName, Country, favouriteFood } = req.data;

// Capture change details
const changeDetails = {
firstName, lastName, Country, favouriteFood
};

const db = await cds.connect.to('db')

// Create an audit log entry
await cds.run(INSERT.into("pocaudit.AuditLogs").entries({
ID: cds.utils.uuid(),
entityName: 'Users',
entityID: ID,
action: req.event.toUpperCase(),
timestamp: new Date().toISOString(),
changedBy: req.user.id,
changes: JSON.stringify(changeDetails)
}));
});

But this event requires I mention the entity. Do you know any way to capture ALL entities so I can make only one handler?

Thanks!!

P.S.: I'm aware of Audit Log Service, but my context requires the audit to stay on a table.

entry.content:

Than Im trying to open the Annotation File Manager, but I always get the message: Annotation File Manager is not supported for the current project. Could you guys help me with this?

This is a view only field for all other countries." from the screen and store it in a String variable in the automation that can be used further. I've declared the editor as an IFRAME element from screen but am not able to drill further and get the contents. Get Element, Get Property Element are also not giving the results.

entry.title: Re: SAP GTS upgrade from V11 to E4H
entry.content:
Best starting point will be the Conversion guide.

https://help.sap.com/gtse4h

You will find the changes to config tables and all the data migration that is been done and changes to the tables.

entry.title: Re: SCMS_BINARY_TO_XSTRING is not permitted in Cloud
entry.content:
Hi!

This question was posted some years ago and I just stumbled across it, but I will provide an answer that might still help others. You can use the XCO_CP (Cloud) or XCO_KU (Key-User) APIs, depending on your use case. There you have an option to e.g. convert XStrings. Please see these documentations:

For Key-Users: 
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/0f69f8fb28ac4bf48d2b57b9637e81fa/de1346c0520c40ff98974ee6f431e39f.html

For Cloud: 
https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_S4HANA_CLOUD/6aa39f1ac05441e5a23f484f31e477e7/0c7aa6642b294709abcc0e3de0488f1a.html

I hope this helps!
~Mathis

entry.title: Re: S/4 Product Compliance - NEW Dangerous Goods Manageme...
entry.content: Mind you, i haven't yet started with DGM.

entry.title: SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation - Setup when test and productive systems are available later
entry.content:
Does SAP Cloud ALM (Features) supports scenario where development system is available, but test and productive systems are available later (meaning, test system might be available 3 months later than development system and productive system more than 9 months after development system provisioning).

 


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP Cloud ALM for Implementation - Setup when test an...
entry.content:
Dear Customer, 

For the requirement : "but test and productive systems are available later (meaning, test system might be available 3 months later than development system and productive system more than 9 months after development system provisioning)." - At TMS, you will need to first create Target system as virtual system as it is not available for certain duration than when the development system is available 

Create the target system virtual system with the SID of the later real target system and follow the recommendation given in https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-alm/setup-administration/tms-configuration-managed-systems 

You could create transport target group between Development and Quality systems and then create another one between Quality and Production systems. (We strongly recommend using a transport target group as a consolidation target). 

As always, TMS transport track is the real and main information used by the Deployment scenario but the system group content should fit with the real transport track defined at TMS level. 

Create the virtual systems with same SID and the routes with the transport target group.

Best Regards, 
Deepa

entry.title: Re: Request to host a CodeJam in Bangalore
entry.content:
@Vidyadhar_Kothekar @nawal_mittal 

Just to be super clear - Vidyadhar is NOT an SAP employee and is NOT authorized or approved to conduct SAP CodeJams.  I have no idea why this person is answering here or offering to conduct a CodeJam.  They absolutely cannot do this without SAP's permission and support. 

That said, someone from our SAP Developer Advocates team will be in touch to discuss the CodeJam request.

entry.title: Creating Dependent RAP BO Entities via Root Entity Determination Logic
entry.content:
Hello, Experts!,

Could you please provide guidance on whether it is considered a best practice to create a dependent entity within a RAP (RESTful ABAP Programming) Business Object by using the determination logic of the root entity?

Specifically, what are the best practices and considerations for implementing such an approach, and under what circumstances might this be recommended or discouraged? Kindly advice.
